src/main/java/org/flaad/dsm/client/reque.general_idea: Rename snake_case fields to camelCase to adhere to Java naming conventions.
Add @Param annotations to map renamed camelCase fields to their original snake_case query parameters for Feign client compatibility.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent from 2.7.0 to 3.3.6 to align with Java 21 and Jakarta EE 9+ standards.
Update the target Java version from 17 to 21 to utilize new language features and performance improvements.
Upgrade Apache Commons IO to version 2.18.0 for bug fixes and compatibility.
Upgrade Feign Jackson dependency to version 13.5 to match Spring Cloud 2023.x requirements.
Upgrade Spring Cloud BOM to 2023.0.6 to support Spring Boot 3.x.
Upgrade Spring Cloud OpenFeign to 4.1.4 to align with the new Spring Cloud release train.
Upgrade Spring Cloud Contract Stub Runner to 4.1.4 for compatibility with the new Spring Cloud version.
Upgrade WireMock to 3.9.2, which requires Java 11+ and aligns with modern testing standards.
Update the Maven version property to 3.9.0 to reflect the build environment capabilities.
Upgrade Checkstyle to 10.21.0 for improved code quality analysis.
Upgrade Spring Java Format Checkstyle plugin to 0.0.47 for updated formatting rules.
Upgrade git-commit-maven-plugin to 7.0.1 for better Git integration.
Upgrade exec-maven-plugin to 3.5.0 for executing external processes.
Upgrade maven-checkstyle-plugin to 3.5.0 for compatibility with newer Checkstyle versions.
Upgrade maven-dependency-plugin to 3.8.1 for dependency management tasks.
Upgrade maven-jacoco-plugin to 0.8.12 for code coverage reporting.
Upgrade maven-surefire-plugin to 3.5.2 for running unit tests.
Upgrade sonar-maven-plugin to 4.0.0.4121 for static code analysis.
Upgrade dependency-check-maven to 11.1.0 for security vulnerability scanning.
Exclude the deprecated Bouncy Castle provider from Spring Cloud OpenFeign to avoid conflicts or security issues.
Explicitly add spring-webmvc dependency, likely to ensure correct version management or resolve transitive dependency issues.
Update WireMock groupId from com.github.tomakehurst to org.wiremock to reflect the official artifact relocation in version 3.x.

.circleci/config.yml.general_idea: Upgrade the CircleCI Docker image from OpenJDK 11 to OpenJDK 17 to align with the project's Java version migration.
Update the SonarCloud orb version to 1.1.1 to ensure compatibility and access to latest features.

.mvn/wrapper/maven-wrapper.properties.general_idea: Upgrade the Maven Wrapper distribution and jar to version 3.9.11 and 3.2.0 respectively to align with the project's migration to Maven 3.9.11.

lombok.config.general_idea: Configure Lombok to stop configuration bubbling to prevent parent directory configs from affecting the project.

sonar-project.properties.general_idea: Update SonarQube configuration to explicitly include test classes and libraries for analysis.
